title: Cocoon | Premium Wellness & Preventive Health
description: Proactive healthcare designed for life. Expert-led wellness services, personalised health screening, and longitudinal care that builds understanding over time.

blocks.headline: Science & *Soul*
blocks.subtitle: Healthcare that honours the whole you.

blocks.heading: A Different Kind of Healthcare
blocks.bodyText: Most healthcare is reactive — you get ill, you get treated, you go home. Cocoon is built around a simple idea: what if your healthcare team knew you before anything went wrong? We combine advanced diagnostics, specialist expertise, and genuine human connection to help you understand your health, track it over time, and make informed decisions about your future.

items.title: Health Screening
items.description: Comprehensive assessments for men and women — from cardiovascular and metabolic panels to cancer screening and hormonal health.

items.title: Specialist Clinics
items.description: Menopause, weight management, fertility, sexual health, cognitive wellness — specialist-led care for complex needs.

items.title: Membership
items.description: Ongoing preventive care with your dedicated team. Annual screenings, priority access, and a health record that grows with you.

blocks.heading: We Remember You
blocks.bodyText: Every visit builds on the last. Your results, your history, your goals — all tracked in your personal health record through My Cocoon. This isn't one-off testing. It's healthcare that understands where you've been and where you're heading.

blocks.heading: Trusted by Those Who Take Health Seriously

cards.title: Want Answers, Not Guesswork
cards.description: You'd rather know where you stand than wonder. You value data, clarity, and straight-talking expertise.

cards.title: Take a Long View on Health
cards.description: You're not waiting to get ill. You invest in prevention because you understand the returns are enormous.

cards.title: Expect More from Healthcare
cards.description: You've experienced the 10-minute GP appointment. You know there's a better way — and you're ready for it.

cards.title: Value Genuine Relationships
cards.description: You want practitioners who remember your name, your history, and your goals. Not a different face every visit.

blocks.alt: The Cocoon team outside the Harrogate clinic

blocks.quote: For the first time, I feel like someone is actually paying attention to my health rather than just ticking boxes. The depth of insight from my screening was genuinely eye-opening.

blocks.headline: What Sets Us Apart
blocks.description: Healthcare should be personal, proactive, and built around you — not the system.

features.title: No Waiting Lists
features.description: Book within days, not months. Your time is valuable and your health shouldn't wait.

features.title: Unhurried Consultations
features.description: 60–90 minutes as standard. Enough time to listen properly, examine thoroughly, and explain clearly.

features.title: Results You Understand
features.description: Not just numbers on a page — clear interpretation, context, and a plan that makes sense to you.

features.title: Beautiful Setting
features.description: A clinic designed to feel nothing like a clinic. Calm, considered, and comfortable from arrival to departure.

features.title: Specialist Network
features.description: When you need expertise beyond our walls, we connect you to the right specialist — fast.

features.title: Your Data, Your Control
features.description: Access everything through My Cocoon. Share with your GP or keep it private — it's your health record.

blocks.heading: Your Health Story Starts Here
blocks.bodyText: Whether you're looking for a comprehensive health screening, specialist care, or an ongoing relationship with a team that truly knows you — we're here.
